tagline: Now available by default for compliance-focused workspaces.
what_it_does: Data Classification is now automatically enabled for Databricks workspaces that have the compliance security profile activated, specifically for those adhering to HIPAA, HITRUST, PCI-DSS, or FedRAMP Moderate standards, or for those without a specific compliance standard. This feature enhances data governance by allowing users to classify sensitive data effectively, ensuring compliance with regulatory requirements. The compliance security profile also includes additional monitoring and security controls to protect regulated data.
why_it_matters: This update significantly enhances data governance capabilities for organizations that must comply with stringent regulatory standards, thereby reducing the risk of non-compliance and potential penalties. By automating data classification, businesses can improve their operational efficiency and focus on core activities rather than manual compliance checks, ultimately leading to better data management and security.
plain_summary: Data Classification is now automatically enabled for Databricks workspaces that have the compliance security profile activated, specifically for those adhering to HIPAA, HITRUST, PCI DSS, or FedRAMP Moderate standards, or for those without a specific…

capabilities.title: Automatic Data Classification
capabilities.desc: Data Classification is enabled by default for compliance security profile workspaces.

capabilities.title: Enhanced Security Monitoring
capabilities.desc: Includes monitoring agents that generate reviewable logs for compliance tracking.

capabilities.title: Hardened Compute Environment
capabilities.desc: Utilizes a CIS Level 1 hardened image and FIPS 140 validated encryption modules.

capabilities.title: Compliance Support
capabilities.desc: Supports various compliance standards including HIPAA, PCI-DSS, and FedRAMP.

prerequisites: Compliance security profile must be enabled.
Workspace must be configured for HIPAA, HITRUST, PCI-DSS, or FedRAMP Moderate standards.
use_cases: Organizations processing PHI data under HIPAA.
Businesses needing to comply with PCI-DSS regulations.
Companies managing sensitive data under FedRAMP standards.
limitations: Certain features may not be available on AWS GovCloud.
Account-level Genie One does not aggregate data from compliance-enabled workspaces.

steps.title: Enable Compliance Profile
steps.desc: Configure the compliance security profile in your Databricks workspace.

steps.title: Select Compliance Standard
steps.desc: Choose the appropriate compliance standard (e.g., HIPAA, PCI-DSS).

steps.title: Review Security Features
steps.desc: Understand the enhanced security features provided by the compliance profile.

steps.title: Monitor Data Classification
steps.desc: Utilize the automatic data classification feature to manage sensitive data.

steps.title: Ensure Compliance
steps.desc: Regularly verify compliance with applicable laws and regulations.

key_takeaway: Data Classification is now automatically available for compliance-focused workspaces, enhancing data governance and regulatory compliance.
